title: Star Citizen - The Freelancer conceptual model review session
description: A short video of Chris Roberts and Jim Martin in a review session for the MISC Freelancer, which is an evolution of a design that the community voted for.

title: Star Citizen - Early work in progress - AI Combat
description:
A short video of the AI of Star Citizen attacking and defending the Bengal Class Carrier. It demonstrates intelligent collision avoidance  - a dense asteroid field, other space ships, including a large capital ship plus offensive and defensive roles.

NOTE: This is very early pre-pre Alpha. There was a bug with laser bolt speed in this build and they were incorrectly capped at a very low speed. That is not how they will behave in the game. But we thought the video was awesome enough to show you anyway!

title: Star Citizen - Early Spaceport concept art to 3D environment test
description: Very early test of moving from concept art of a spaceport to a 3D environment. Please note the fidelity of the environment and buildings is MUCH lower than what it will be in the actual game and a lot of the background city environment is missing.

title: Star Citizen - FINAL WEEK PUSH
description: We have one week left in the Star Citizen crowd funding campaign. Lets get to $4 million!

title: Star Citizen at GDC Online Teaser
description: Meet some of the fans who made the trip to Austin to see Chris Roberts' Star Citizen announcement in person! Learn more about Star Citizen at www.robertsspaceindustries.com

title: Star Citizen adds Kickstarter!
description: You can pledge your support at the RSI Kickstarter page: http://www.kickstarter.com/projects/cig/star-citizen/

title: Star Citizen - What is It?
description:
If you keep seeing this video, it means you haven't subscribed to Roberts Space Industries yet.

Click that fancy subscribe button to get all the latest content from RSI including an inside look at the development of "Star Citizen" the latest space-sim game from Chris Roberts.

Roberts Space Industries is a fictional spacecraft manufacturer within the persistent-world game "Star Citizen" and its companion single-player spaceflight sim, "Squadron 42."  RSI is also your portal for information, updates, and purchases of your very own spacecraft with which to trade, plunder, and protect the citizens of Star Citizen.

Be sure to visit Roberts Space Industries here and on your favorite social platform:

RSI - http://RobertsSpaceIndustries.com
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/RobertsSpaceIndustries
Twitter - https://twitter.com/RobertsSpaceInd
Google+ - https://plus.google.com/115090625624883320504/posts
